response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:01: Intro greeting. 2. 00:01-01:58: Detected the song 'Umyau-nya Happy Life' performed by Mizumina Mizu. Since it is an original birthday song, Mizumina Mizu is considered the original artist. Lyrics were transcribed from on-screen text as they were not found in online databases. 3. 01:58-02:32: Post-performance talk. 4. 02:32-05:00: Merchandise showcase.
response.global_summary: A video featuring the VTuber Mizumina Mizu celebrating her 2026 birthday. It includes an introductory greeting, a performance of her original birthday song 'Umyau-nya Happy Life', a short talk, and a showcase of birthday merchandise.

scenes.description: The VTuber Mizumina Mizu waves to the camera and begins her birthday festival livestream.
Mizumina Mizu performs her original song 'Umyau-nya Happy Life'. On-screen text displays the lyrics throughout the performance.
scenes.song_title: うみゃうにゃはっぴーらいふ
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
えっ！いい天気！あの雲ソフトクリームみたい！
あ、あっちわ！わ・た・が・し！
雲ってふわふわで美味しそう！
人生で1回は食べてみたいよね～
うじじゃない！！
しんどいしんどいまじしんどいわ
現実逃避なんどもしちゃうわ
妄想、空想、頭がぽそう
カツオたべたーい！！
... (歌は楽しく、食べることや幸せに関する言葉が続きます)
...だからどうかお願い
このおなかを満たして神さま！
...たべたい、ねてたい、むずかしいことはなにもかんがえたくない
...あとあと、みんなでおかしパーティーもしよー！！
...しあわせタイム！
...たべてねてあそんでまたたべ！
...まだたりない！
...もっともっとたべさせてー！
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Wow! Nice weather! That cloud looks like soft-serve ice cream!
Ah, over there! Cot-ton-can-dy!
The clouds look fluffy and delicious!
I want to eat them at least once in my life~
Not a maggot!!
It's hard, it's hard, it's seriously hard
I escape reality many times
Delusions, fantasies, my head is hazy
I want to eat bonito!!
... (The song continues with playful, food-themed lyrics about eating and happiness)
...Please, dear God, fill my stomach!
...I want to eat, I want to sleep, I don't want to think about difficult things
...Let's have a snack party later!!
...Happiness time!
...Eat, sleep, play, then eat again!
...Give me more, I haven't had enough yet!
...More, more, let me eat more!

scenes.description: The VTuber talks to the audience about the new song and engages with viewers in the comments.
Mizumina Mizu showcases various birthday merchandise items, including an acrylic panel, badges, a plushie, a shoulder bag, and a voice pack.
